business_ideas.idea: Epic Gardening: YouTube gardening content (2M subs) evolved into e-commerce (seeds, plants) $30M+ annual revenue.
Botanical Seeds acquisition: bought existing seed company with 4-5k retail store distribution.
YourHousePlant.com acquisition: bought for $1k, immediately profitable, indoor plant content + commerce.
Kagi.com: ad-free subscription search engine ($5-10/month) with 30k paying members, $1.5M annual revenue.
New avocado variety via selective breeding: Kevin Espiritu's 3-year experimental mission to grow unique avocado.
Venture-backed mango innovation: perfectly spherical, easy-to-eat mangoes optimized for texture and juiciness.
Camp MFM-style active business conferences: business retreat model combining sports/activities with entrepreneurship.

predictions.text: By 2026, Google search will see 25% traffic reduction due to AI-powered search alternatives.
Creator-to-commerce model with negative CAC will dominate next generation of e-commerce brands.
